mapper.select: SELECT account_sn, login_id, password, display_name, role, last_login_dt, created_at, updated_at FROM t_user WHERE login_id = #{loginId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT account_sn, login_id, password, display_name, role, last_login_dt, created_at, updated_at FROM t_user WHERE account_sn = #{accountSn, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user WHERE login_id = #{loginId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user SET last_login_dt = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE account_sn = #{accountSn, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT jti, account_sn, login_id, family_id, token_hash, revoked_yn, expires_at, created_at FROM t_refresh_token WHERE jti = #{jti, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_refresh_token SET revoked_yn = 'Y', updated_at = NOW() WHERE jti = #{jti, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_refresh_token WHERE login_id = #{loginId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
